name: Crunch and Raisin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter or margarine; room temperature (1 stick)
1 cup Light brown sugar; firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease cookie sheets.
3. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt on a piece of wax paper; stir to mix well.
4. Beat together butter, peanut butter, sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in eggs and milk until smooth.
6. Stir in the flour mixture until well blended.
7. Gently mix in granola and raisins.
8. Drop batter by rounded teaspoonfuls 2 inches apart on prepared cookie sheets.
9. Bake in the preheated moderate oven at 350°F for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Remove to wire racks to cool.
Yield: About 7 dozen.
